picks.quote: we got that one right which was great... I thought Yuri was overrated... I felt like Jai Tucker at 23 years old was way more seasoned.
Kane Sandaval looked great. Leveled up. I told you he'd fight for our money... Brandon Lee got beat up.
I think Abdullah makes this look easy. I think Dela walks I think Dela walks Bell down... My question isn't will Mason win. My question is how will Mason win?
